info.title: Forge API
info.description:
Forge: Production-grade AI development platform

Features:
- Structure-aware code editing
- Real-time collaboration
- Enterprise security & monitoring

Documentation: https://docs.forge.ai
Support: support@forge.ai

get.description: List model identifiers available on this server based on configured providers.

schema.title: Response Get Models Api Options Models Get

get.description: List available agent types supported by this server.

schema.title: Response Get Agents Api Options Agents Get

get.description: List supported security analyzers.

schema.title: Response Get Security Analyzers Api Options Security Analyzers Get

get.description:
Get current server configuration and settings.

Retrieves the complete active server configuration including deployment
mode, feature flags, API settings, and other runtime parameters.

schema.title: Response Get Config Api Options Config Get

get.description: List files in the specified path.

parameters.name: path

schema.description: Optional path to list files from
schema.title: Path

parameters.description: Optional path to list files from

get.description:
Retrieve the content of a specified file.

To select a file:

schema.title: Response 200 Select File Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Files Select File Get
Response 500 Select File Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Files Select File Get
Response 415 Select File Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Files Select File Get

get.description: Zip the current workspace and return it as a downloadable file.

schema.title: Response 500 Zip Current Workspace Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Files Zip Directory Get

get.description:
Get list of git-tracked file changes in the workspace.

Retrieves the conversation's runtime and queries it for modified files
compared to the git repository. Returns empty list if not a git repository
or if git is unavailable in the runtime container.
Get git diff for a specific path in the workspace.

schema.description: Path to get git diff for
schema.title: Path

post.description: Upload files to the workspace.

Submit user feedback with conversation trajectory.

Captures user feedback about a conversation session, including email,
system version, permission preferences, sentiment polarity, and the
complete conversation trajectory for analysis.

get.description: Simple test endpoint without any parameters.

Retrieve the runtime configuration.

Currently, this is the session ID and runtime ID (if available).

Get git changes in the workspace.

Returns the list of modified, added, and deleted files by running
``git status --porcelain`` inside the conversation workspace.

Get git diff for a specific file.

Runs ``git diff`` for the given file path inside the conversation workspace.

parameters.name: path

schema.description: File path to get diff for
schema.title: Path

parameters.description: File path to get diff for

get.description: Search through the event stream with filtering and pagination.

post.description: Add an event to a conversation.

Accept raw text/plain POSTs and forward them as a MessageAction.

This is a developer convenience so tools that have trouble building

conversation. The raw body becomes the action args.content.

get.description:
Get all playbooks associated with the conversation.

This endpoint returns all repository and knowledge playbooks that are loaded for the conversation.

post.description:
Get code completion suggestions for the current position in a file.

Delegates all resilience logic (circuit breaker, retry, budget, security,
anti-hallucination) to ``CompletionService``.
Initialize a new session or join an existing one.

get.description: HTTP endpoint to paginate conversation metadata with optional filters.
Test endpoint to verify routing is working.
Simple endpoint without dependencies to test routing.

schema.title: Response Simple Conversations Endpoint Api Conversations Simple Get
Response  Delete Conversation Route Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Delete
Response Update Conversation Api Conversations  Conversation Id  Patch

get.description: Generate a prompt for remembering conversation context at specific event.

post.description: Start an agent loop for a conversation.
Stop an agent loop for a conversation.

get.description: Get conversations for the playbook management page with pagination.

Load user settings with token status information.

🚀 PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZED: 60s cache with proper per-user key for 2-3x improvement.
   - Increased TTL from 30s to 60s
   - Fixed cache key to use user_id instead of settings_hash
   - Expected: 1,295ms → ~300-500ms for 10 concurrent users

post.description:
Store user settings with clean, secure API key handling.

Uses the new APIKeyManager for secure, provider-aware API key validation and storage.

schema.title: Response 200 Store Settings Api Settings Post
Response 500 Store Settings Api Settings Post

post.description:
Store or update git provider authentication tokens.

Validates and stores provider tokens (GitHub).
Remove all git provider authentication tokens.

get.description: Get list of custom secret names and descriptions (without values).

post.description: Create a new custom secret.

put.description:
Update an existing custom secret's name and/or description.

Secret value is preserved. Allows renaming if new name doesn't conflict.

delete.description: Delete a custom secret by ID.

get.description: List all memories for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Memories Api Memory  Get

post.description: Create a new memory.

schema.title: Response Create Memory Api Memory  Post

post.description: Search memories based on criteria.

schema.title: Response Search Memories Api Memory Search Post

get.description: Get memory statistics.

post.description: Track memory usage (increment usage count and update last used).

schema.title: Response Track Memory Usage Api Memory  Memory Id  Track Usage Post

get.description: Export all memories to JSON.

schema.title: Response Export Memories Api Memory Export Get

post.description: Import memories from JSON file.

schema.title: Response Import Memories Api Memory Import Post

get.description: Get a single memory by ID.

schema.title: Response Get Memory Api Memory  Memory Id  Get
Response Update Memory Api Memory  Memory Id  Patch
Response Delete Memory Api Memory  Memory Id  Delete

get.description: Detailed health check for all system components.
JSON-formatted system and agent metrics.

Per-session cost and budget summary for all active conversations.

Returns accumulated cost, budget limit, percentage used, and a
list of per-session cost breakdowns.  Useful for dashboards and
preventing surprise bills.
Prometheus-compatible metrics endpoint.
Statistics for internal caches.
Distribution of failure types encountered by agents.
Statistics for parallel execution features.
Health status of a specific agent controller.
Health status of the process manager.
Aggregate EventStream backpressure and durability health across sessions.

post.description: Create a new knowledge base collection.

get.description: List all collections for the user.

schema.title: Response List Collections Api Knowledge Base Collections Get

get.description: Get a collection by ID.

delete.description: Delete a collection and all its documents.

post.description: Upload a document to a collection.

get.description: List all documents in a collection.

schema.title: Response List Documents Api Knowledge Base Collections  Collection Id  Documents Get

get.description: Get a document by ID.

post.description: Search the knowledge base.

schema.title: Response Search Knowledge Base Api Knowledge Base Search Post

get.description: Get knowledge base statistics.

schema.title: Response Get Stats Api Knowledge Base Stats Get

post.description:
Upload multiple documents to a collection in parallel.

Processes documents concurrently with bounded parallelism to improve
throughput while avoiding resource exhaustion. Returns detailed results
for each document including success/failure status.

schema.title: Response Bulk Upload Documents Api Knowledge Base Collections  Collection Id  Documents Bulk Post

get.description: List all templates.

schema.title: Response List Templates Api Templates  Get

post.description: Create a new template.

get.description: Get a template.

post.description: Track template usage.

get.description:
Export all user data as a downloadable JSON backup file.

Aggregates all memories, templates, and settings
into a single GlobalExportData structure and returns it as an HTTP
attachment with timestamped filename for download.

post.description:
Import all user data from a backup file.

Restores user data from a previously exported GlobalExportData structure.
Processes memories and templates in sequence,
creating new files or updating existing ones.

schema.title: Response Import All Data Api Global Export  Post

get.description: Get user's installations/workspaces for the specified provider.

schema.title: Response Get User Installations Api User Installations Get

get.description: Get user's repositories from git provider.

schema.title: Response Get User Repositories Api User Repositories Get

get.description: Get authenticated user information from git provider.
Search repositories from GitHub.

schema.title: Response Search Repositories Api User Search Repositories Get

get.description: Search branches in a repository.

schema.title: Response Search Branches Api User Search Branches Get

get.description: Get suggested tasks for the authenticated user from their GitHub repositories.

schema.title: Response Get Suggested Tasks Api User Suggested Tasks Get

get.description: Get branches for a repository.

Scan the playbooks directory of a repository and return the list of playbooks.

The playbooks directory location depends on the actual repository name:
- If actual repository name is ".Forge": scans "playbooks" folder
- Otherwise: scans ".Forge/playbooks" folder

schema.title: Response Get Repository Playbooks Api User Repository  Repository Name  Playbooks Get

get.description: Fetch the content of a specific playbook file from a repository.

parameters.name: file_path

schema.description: Path to the playbook file within the repository
schema.title: File Path

parameters.description: Path to the playbook file within the repository

post.description: Generate summary of repository contents invoked via API request.

schema.title: Response Summarize Repository Api User Git Summarize Repository Post

get.description:
Get trajectory history for a conversation.

Supports optional pagination via ``since_id`` (for reconnection-based
delta fetches) and ``limit`` (cap returned events).

Events are read from the conversation's file-backed event stream.

parameters.name: since_id

schema.description: Return events with id > since_id (for reconnect)
schema.title: Since Id

parameters.description: Return events with id > since_id (for reconnect)

get.description: List notifications for the current user.
Get unread notification count.
Get a specific notification.
Global search across all resources.
Simple liveness probe returning status ok.

Liveness probe endpoint.

Returns 200 as long as the process is running and can serve requests.
Unlike /alive, includes uptime information.

Readiness probe endpoint.

Checks that critical subsystems (config, file store) are operational.
Returns 200 if all checks pass, 503 if any critical check fails.
Return a diagnostic snapshot of a live session.
List all active session IDs (debug only).

commit_sha.description: SHA of the latest commit on this branch

last_push_date.title: Last Push Date
last_push_date.description: ISO timestamp of the last push to this branch

usage_count.title: Usage Count
usage_count.description: Number of times template was used

ConversationTrigger.title: ConversationTrigger
ConversationTrigger.description: Describe external event that initiated a conversation.

CreateCollectionRequest.title: CreateCollectionRequest
CreateCollectionRequest.description: Request to create a new collection.

CreateMemoryRequest.title: CreateMemoryRequest
CreateMemoryRequest.description: Request to create a new memory.

vcs_provider.description: Git provider type (optional, will be auto-detected)

CreatePlaybook.title: CreatePlaybook
CreatePlaybook.description: Model for creating a new playbook.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of what this secret is used for

CustomSecret.title: CustomSecret
CustomSecret.description: Represents a user-defined secret (value plus description).

GETSettingsModel.title: GETSettingsModel
GETSettingsModel.description: Settings with additional token data for the client.

InitSessionRequest.title: InitSessionRequest
InitSessionRequest.description: Request payload for creating or resuming a conversation session.

MCPConfig.title: MCPConfig
MCPConfig.description:
Configuration for MCP (Message Control Protocol) settings.

Attributes:
    sse_servers: List of MCP SSE server configs
    stdio_servers: List of MCP stdio server configs. These servers will be added to the MCP Router running inside runtime container.
    shttp_servers: List of MCP HTTP server configs.

MCPRemoteServerConfig.title: MCPRemoteServerConfig
MCPRemoteServerConfig.description:
Configuration for remote MCP servers (SSE or HTTP).

Attributes:
    url: The server URL
    api_key: Optional API key for authentication
    transport: Transport type (sse or shttp)

MCPStdioServerConfig.title: MCPStdioServerConfig
MCPStdioServerConfig.description:
Configuration for a MCP server that uses stdio.

Attributes:
    name: The name of the server
    command: The command to run the server
    args: The arguments to pass to the server
    env: The environment variables to set for the server

branches.title: Branches
branches.description: List of branches in this page

has_next_page.title: Has Next Page
has_next_page.description: Whether there are more pages available

PaginatedBranchesResponse.title: PaginatedBranchesResponse
PaginatedBranchesResponse.description: Response model for paginated branch list.

PlaybookContentResponse.title: PlaybookContentResponse
PlaybookContentResponse.description: Response model for individual playbook content endpoint.

PlaybookResponse.title: PlaybookResponse
PlaybookResponse.description:
Response model for playbooks endpoint.

Note: This model only includes basic metadata that can be determined
without parsing playbook content. Use the separate content API
to get detailed playbook information.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: User ID associated with the token

host.title: Host
host.description: Custom host/domain for the provider (e.g., github.company.com)

ProviderToken.title: ProviderToken
ProviderToken.description: Typed container for provider access tokens plus optional metadata.

ProvidersSetModel.title: ProvidersSetModel
ProvidersSetModel.description: Wrapper for optional provider list supplied when starting a conversation.

pushed_at.title: Pushed At
pushed_at.description: ISO timestamp of last push (if available)

owner_type.description: Type of repository owner (user or organization)

collection_ids.title: Collection Ids
collection_ids.description: Collection IDs to search in (None = all)

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: Number of top results to return

SearchRequest.title: SearchRequest
SearchRequest.description: Request to search the knowledge base.

SuggestedTask.title: SuggestedTask
SuggestedTask.description: Model representing a suggested task from a git provider.

TaskType.title: TaskType
TaskType.description: Task type enumeration for suggested tasks.

UpdateConversationRequest.title: UpdateConversationRequest
UpdateConversationRequest.description: Request model for updating conversation metadata.

User.title: User
User.description: Model representing a user from a git provider.

UserSecrets-Input.title: UserSecrets
UserSecrets-Input.description: Container for storing provider tokens and custom secrets for a user.

UserSecrets-Output.title: UserSecrets
UserSecrets-Output.description: Container for storing provider tokens and custom secrets for a user.
